Class MathExampleConfig

java.lang.Object
configs.MathExampleConfig
All Implemented Interfaces:
Config
public class MathExampleConfig extends Object implements Config
Example configuration that wires a pipeline of three BinOpAgent instances.

On create(), instantiates:

  • plus: A + B → R1
  • minus: A - B → R2
  • mul: R1 * R2 → R3

Serves as a programmatic alternative to file-based loading via GenericConfig.

See Also:
  • Config
  • BinOpAgent
